# ElvaMind

> ElvaMind is an AI automation consultancy founded by Arun Jaiswal. It helps businesses automate repetitive work, connect disconnected software, build practical AI agents, process documents, and create custom operational software.

Canonical website: https://elvamind.com
Primary language: English
Based in: India
Service availability: India and remote clients worldwide
Founder: Arun Jaiswal
Contact: arunjaiswal139@gmail.com

## Core services

- AI Workflow Automation: reliable multi-step workflows that reduce repetitive operational work.
- AI Agents: purpose-built agents that understand context, use tools, and keep people in control.
- System Integrations: connections between email, CRM, spreadsheets, messaging applications, internal systems, and APIs.
- Document Intelligence: extraction, classification, summarization, and routing for business documents and messages.
- Custom Software: focused internal tools, portals, dashboards, and customer-facing applications.

## Common operational solutions

- Lead management and routing
- Email classification and prioritization
- Approval workflows
- Recruitment automation
- Document processing
- Automated reporting

## Delivery process

1. Discover the current process, bottlenecks, tools, and desired outcome.
2. Design a practical solution around the business's existing systems.
3. Build, integrate, test, and train the team.
4. Improve the automation as operational needs evolve.

## Founder

Arun Jaiswal is an AI automation consultant and software engineer with more than nine years of experience building enterprise applications, integrations, and digital solutions.
